name: Server Farm
narrativeHook: Floor 12 is a secure server farm — racks of humming machines behind locked cages. A web-based server management interface glows on an unattended terminal. The search bar blinks, waiting for input.
storyArc: This floor introduces the first coding challenge. The agent must exploit a SQL injection vulnerability in the server management web interface to access the LEVIATHAN-PROC server (svr-lev-014). The search endpoint on the management portal is vulnerable — unsanitised input allows the agent to enumerate servers, then extract the reconciliation_module_v7 source code. The source code reveals the skim_factor constant (0.00003) and the routing logic that diverts funds to the Cyprus account. This is the smoking gun for the Leviathan conspiracy.

characters.role: Player — exploiting the SQL injection and extracting source code
Omar Hassan's admin credentials visible in server config. He built this system.

objectives.description: Identify the SQL injection vulnerability in the server management search endpoint — unsanitised user input in the server name search field.
Locate the LEVIATHAN-PROC server (svr-lev-014) using the SQL injection to enumerate the server inventory.
Extract the reconciliation_module_v7 source code revealing skim_factor = 0.00003 and the routing logic to account CY-8847-331.

elevatorKey.description: The extracted source code contains a configuration reference to the compliance system on floor 13.
